title: Login Issue
description: User unable to login with correct credentials.

title: Payment Failed
description: Payment not going through on checkout.

title: Account Locked
description: User account locked after multiple failed attempts.

title: Order Not Delivered
description: Customer did not receive order even after 7 days.

title: Refund Request
description: Customer wants a refund for canceled order.

title: Password Reset
description: User forgot password and needs reset link.

title: App Crash
description: Mobile app crashes on login.

title: Incorrect Billing
description: User charged twice for one order.

title: Feature Request
description: User requests dark mode in the app.

title: Bug in Checkout
description: Discount code not applying at checkout.

title: Shipping Address Error
description: Order shipped to wrong address.

title: Email Not Received
description: User did not receive confirmation email.

title: App Slow
description: Mobile app runs very slow on Android devices.

title: Order Cancellation
description: Customer wants to cancel order after placing it.

title: Wrong Product Delivered
description: Customer received wrong product variant.

title: Feedback Not Saved
description: User feedback not being saved in profile.

title: Notification Bug
description: Notifications not appearing on app home screen.

title: Cart Not Updating
description: Cart quantity does not update after adding items.

title: Profile Picture Upload
description: Cannot upload profile picture in settings.

title: App Logout Issue
description: App logs out user automatically after 5 minutes.
